name: MHTOCSMMConditionsInfections
title: MH TOC Conditions (Infections)
description: This profile sets minimum expectations for the Condition resource for querying an individual’s record for infections-related data, as it relates to postpartum clinical care. It identifies which core elements, extensions, vocabularies, and value sets **SHALL** be present in the resource and constrains the way the elements are used when using this profile. It provides the floor for standards development for specific use cases. The MH TOC Conditions Infections Profile is derived from the MH TOC Conditions Profile.
